title: helichrysum umbellulatum
intro: Helichrysum umbellulatum, also known as the yellow disc helichrysum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to South Africa. It is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Helichrysum umbellulatum include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Helichrysum umbellulatum, such as essential oil and tinctures, are commonly used in aromatherapy and traditional medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
